hero.title: Fresh design vision for modern interiors.
hero.copy: I am a beginner interior designer focused on calm layouts, soft palettes, and practical spaces that feel personal and functional.
hero.designerText: Age 22. Building strong skills through recent academy training and design software practice.

about.title: Mariam Adamashvili
about.text: I am at the beginning of my interior design career and focused on growing through real projects, clear process, and continuous learning.
about.note: My current direction combines soft contemporary aesthetics with practical planning for everyday living.

services.title: Interior services for small and medium residential projects.
services.text: Current services are focused on concept development, visual planning, and practical space improvements.

items.title: Interior Concept
items.text: Mood, color, and style direction tailored to your apartment or house.

items.title: Space Planning
items.text: Functional zoning and furniture placement for better daily comfort.

items.title: 3D Visualization
items.text: Basic visual previews to help you understand the design before execution.

items.title: Material Selection
items.text: Guidance on finishes, tones, and combinations for a cohesive look.

items.title: Furniture Styling
items.text: Recommendations for furniture, decor, and accessory balance.

items.title: Design Support
items.text: Ongoing communication and support during renovation decisions.

portfolio.title: Self-initiated concept visuals
portfolio.text: These interiors are personal imagination-based concept projects created by Mariam Adamashvili to demonstrate her design skills.

process.title: Simple and clear project steps.
process.text: A beginner-friendly workflow with close communication and transparent decisions.

items.title: Intro Call
items.text: Understand goals, budget, and space type.

items.title: Concept Draft
items.text: Create early layout and design direction.

items.title: Final Guidance
items.text: Deliver final selections and implementation notes.

testimonials.title: Client feedback
testimonials.text: Early project feedback from collaboration and study-based work.

items.quote: Clear communication and nice taste. The room became more organized and warm.
items.name: Nina B.

items.quote: Strong effort and good attention to details. Revisions were handled quickly.
items.name: Tatia M.

items.quote: Great start for a young designer. The final concept looked balanced and elegant.
items.name: Lika C.

contact.title: Send your project details.
contact.text: Share your space goals and I will get back to you with next steps.
